data.title: The USD1 stablecoin launched by WLFI has a circulation volume of 108 million on BSC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain information, the USD1 stablecoin launched by Trump's crypto project WLFI has a circulation of more than 100 million on BSC, and now stands at 108,489,090.

data.title: Senator Tim Scott: Confident that market structure bill will be passed before August
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tim Scott, chairman of the U.S. Senate Banking Committee, recently said that the crypto market structure bill is expected to be passed by August 2025. He pointed out that the committee had promoted key crypto regulatory issues such as the GENIUS Act in March this year, reflecting the priority of crypto policy. Scott emphasized that "innovation must come before regulation" to ensure the United States' global economic dominance in the field of digital assets. The timetable is also consistent with the expectations of Kristin Smith, CEO of the Blockchain Association. Several Democratic lawmakers also expressed support for market structure and stablecoin legislation, and pointed out that Congress has a broad bipartisan consensus on this issue. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump administration exempts smartphones and computers from 125% China tariffs
data.description:
The Trump administration exempts smartphones, laptops, and key tech products from a 125% tariff on Chinese imports, marking a shift in trade policy.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/smartphones-computers-exempted-from-tariffs/

data.title: BTC Price – Why This Analyst Doesn’t Think Bitcoin Top Is In
data.description:
BTC price is showing signs of a bottoming formation with technical indicators suggesting a potential breakout to new all-time highs, according to crypto analyst Dan Gambardello. The analyst highlights patterns on Bitcoin’s weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) that have historically preceded significant price movements.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/12/btc-price-analyst-says-why-he-doesnt-think-bitcoin-top-is-in/

data.title: NEAR Poised For Surge To $2.40 As Bullish Pattern Forms
data.description:
Prominent crypto analyst Ali Martinez has shared a bullish prediction on the NEAR market suggesting a potential 15% gain is on the horizon. Amidst a major downtrend, Martinez’s latest forecast reveals the altcoin could soon see a significant market rebound. Related Reading: Is It Time For Altcoin Season? Bitcoin Dominance Rises To Major Rejection Zone Inverse Head-And-Shoulders Pattern Forms As NEAR Prepares For Rally In an X post on April 11, Ali Martinez shows a technical analysis of the NEAR 3-day chart revealing the formation of an inverse head-and-shoulders pattern which signals a potential price upswing. In financial markets, the inverse head-and-shoulders pattern is a bullish formation that often acts as a reliable indicator of a trend reversal
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/near-protocol/near-poised-for-surge-to-2-40-as-bullish-pattern-forms/

data.title: Star Hedge Fund Manager On 9-Year Hot Streak Reaps Massive Profits On Trump Bets: Report
data.description:
British-American investment management firm BlueCrest Capital is reportedly sitting on massive gains after its owner – billionaire Michael Platt – took a bet on the new White House administration.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/12/star-hedge-fund-manager-on-9-year-hot-streak-reaps-massive-profits-on-trump-bets-report/

data.title: Binance Founder Denies Money Laundering Allegations
data.description:
Binance founder Chris Zhao challenges money laundering allegations; emphasizes asset security and regulatory compliance.
source: https://coincu.com/331809-binance-founder-denies-allegations

data.title: Tron’s Justin Sun, Binance’s CZ Debunk DOJ Hoax, What Happened?
data.description:
Both Binance founder Changpeng ‘CZ’ Zhao and Justin Sun, the founder of the Tron Blockchain, have individually debunked the ongoing rumors that sprang up from a Wall Street Journal post. The media House claimed that CZ is providing evidence against Sun as part of the 2023 plea deal he struck with the US authorities.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/12/trons-justin-sun-binances-cz-debunks-doj-hoax-what-happened/

data.title: Trump-Backed USD1 Stablecoin Gains $18M Liquidity from DWF Labs
data.description:
DWF Labs deploys $18M liquidity for Trump-backed WLFI stablecoin, USD1, across Ethereum and BSC.
source: https://coincu.com/331806-trump-family-usd1-liquidity-deployment

data.title: 8 Charlie Munger Quotes for Investors Through This Bitcoin Price Retreat
data.description:
The late Berkshire Hathaway Vice Chairman Charlie Munger's name still comes up in financial media after he passed away in Nov. 2023. His timeless wisdom applies to this Bitcoin bear market.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/8-charlie-munger-quotes-for-investors-through-this-bitcoin-price-retreat/
